objective: Reject config create/upsert request-body workspace/environment mismatches before scope lookup or mutation.
rollbackNotes: Preserve unrelated user changes; revert only this checkpoint scope if explicitly approved.
validationRun: .\mvnw.cmd -pl services/foundation-service -am test passed with 109 foundation-service tests and upstream shared-module tests.
git diff --check for touched config service/test/checkpoint files passed with CRLF warnings only.
outcome: Config create/upsert now rejects request-body workspace/environment mismatches before repository lookup or save; explicit workspace/environment scope requires trusted args or matching TenantContext.
residualRisks: Config version-history records still lack workspace/environment fields and need a schema-backed follow-up.
Tenant lifecycle cross-tenant policy remains a separate platform-admin versus self-tenant decision.
Production release remains blocked by target-environment evidence and strict release gates.
nextAction: Record completion in shared backlog/memory/handoff after the current audience metadata lease releases, then continue with the next safe foundation-service item.
